creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
There are lots of updates for Xfce ports, but patches still not commited:

2017-05-16 Add support of libgarcon-gtk[23] in Mk/Uses/xfce.mk
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=219334 

2017-06-11 sysutils/garcon: Update to 0.6.1
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=219928

2017-05-17 x11/xfce4-whiskermenu-plugin: Update to 1.7.2
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=219347

2017-06-17 deskutils/xfce4-xkb-plugin: Update to 0.8.0
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220071

2017-06-26 x11-wm/xfce4-desktop: Update to 4.12.4
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220290

2017-07-01 x11-fm/thunar: Update to 1.6.12
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220407

2017-07-16 x11/xfce4-terminal: Update to 0.8.6
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220751

2017-07-17 deskutils/xfce4-tumbler: Update to 0.2.0
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220805

2017-07-22 x11/xfce4-clipman-plugin: Update to 1.4.2
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220925

What is wrong with these patches or what is the reason for the delay?
